violations.text: Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Working containers were labeled during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance and side door for kitchen, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2-door cookline low boy unit. Refrigerator gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

Some floor tiles in the kitchen observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors/walls/ceiling shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) observed with food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. -Staff washed, rinsed, and sanitized the slicer during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2023

The door to the outside, located in the front, observed not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine observed with pink and black residue. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

Some floor tiles in the kitchen area observed in poor repair. Tiles observed cracked and chipped. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. -Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
